_comment: Captured 2026-06-02 from `grok agent --no-leader stdio` (cmux.app build, agentVersion 0.2.11) by sending an ACP initialize. _meta.mcpServers and _meta.hostname/agentIds were SCRUBBED (the live response leaked the user's MCP env secrets). Use as a decode fixture for the ACP initialize result.

_meta.mcpServers: <scrubbed: live response leaked user MCP env incl. secrets>

availableCommands.name: compact
availableCommands.description: Compress conversation history to save context window

input.hint: optional context about what to preserve

availableCommands.name: always-approve
availableCommands.description: Toggle always-approve mode (skip all permission prompts)

availableCommands.name: context
availableCommands.description: Show context window usage and session stats

availableCommands.name: session-info
availableCommands.description: Show session details (model, turns, context usage)
